heading: Interest of Members of Congress in contracts for acquisition of land
label: 702m Interest of Members of Congress in contracts for acquisition of land
text: In every contract or agreement to be made or entered into for the acquisition of land either by private sale or condemnation as in sections 702a, 702b to 702d, 702e to 702g, 702h, 702i, 702j, 702k, 702, 702m, and 704 of this title provided the provisions contained in shall be applicable.lsection 6306(a) of title 41
notes: CodificationIn text, “section 6306(a)” substituted for “section 3741 of the Revised Statutes being of the United States Code” on authority of , , , which Act enacted Title 41, Public Contracts.section 22 of title 41Pub. L. 111–350, § 6(c)124 Stat. 3854Jan. 4, 2011
